parameters.description: Whether the component is disabled.

parameters.description: Maximum number of characters allowed.

parameters.description: Whether the field is read-only.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Whether the field is required.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: The size of the input field.

parameters.name: Suffix
parameters.description: Content displayed after the input (e.g., unit label).

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML input type (text, email, password, etc.).

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The current value of the form control.
